text:
God is faithful.
He provides a way out.

I can do all things
through Christ.

Do not grow weary.
The harvest is coming.

Be strong.
Be courageous.

Guard your heart.
Guard your life.

Hide His Word.
Stand firm.

Overcome evil.
With good.

Power.
Love. Self-control.

Lay aside sin.
Run the race.

Watch and pray.
Stand strong.

God is our refuge.
And strength.

Hope in the Lord.
Renew your strength.

Put on the armor.
Stand firm.

Resist the devil.
He will flee.

Commit your way.
Trust the Lord.

Cast your cares.
He cares for you.

More than conquerors.
Through Christ.

The Son sets free.
Live free.

Taste and see.
The Lord is good.

New mercies.
Every morning.
